name: hubdb_table_id
label: HubDB table ID
help_text: Single HubDB table ID (commas/spaces in the value are stripped). Use 0 to disable the query.

name: hubdb_row_ids
label: HubDB row IDs (optional)
help_text: Comma-separated HubDB row IDs (e.g. 123,456,789). When any IDs are set, ONLY those rows are shown in this order and the tag filter (filter column + value) is ignored. Leave blank to use tag filtering instead.

name: hubdb_limit
label: Max rows
help_text: Matching rows to show. With a filter, up to 500 rows are read until enough matches.

name: filter_column
label: Filter column (optional)
help_text: HubDB column with comma-separated tags (e.g. CA,DS,EDD). Leave filter column and value blank to show all rows (up to max).

name: filter_value
label: Filter value (optional)
help_text: Exact token match after trim within comma-separated filter column.

name: col_type
label: Column name for type (pill)
help_text: e.g. page_template — shown as badge on the card image.

name: col_image
label: Column name for image (optional)
help_text: HubDB Image column, or Text with filename when Image file base URL is set.

name: image_base_url
label: Image file base URL (optional)
help_text: If set, image column is treated as path/filename under this URL.

name: col_desc
label: Column name for description
help_text: Rich text or plain text column; HTML is rendered when present.

name: col_cta_label
label: Column name for CTA label
help_text: If empty or cell blank, label falls back to Read More.
